name: puffer
description: Native liquid Ethereum restaking supercharged by EigenLayer.

name: ether.fi Stake
description: Decentralized and non-custodial Ethereum staking protocol.

name: Kelp
description: Kelp is the second largest liquid restaking protocol with ~$2B+ in TVL. Its liquid restaked token, rsETH, is live across 10+ major L2s and 40+ DeFi platforms, allowing users to restake while maintaining full liquidity.

name: Renzo
description: The Renzo Protocol acts as an interface on top of EigenLayer, enhancing Ethereum staking by securing Actively Validated Services and offering higher yields

name: Mantle Bridge
description: Mantle Network is a Layer-2 (L2) scalability solution built on Ethereum which is the Layer-1 (L1).

name: Mellow LRT
description: Mellow Protocol is a permissionless system for active liquidity management and building trustless automatic DeFi strategies

name: Swell L2 Farm
description: Pre-launch deposits for Swell L2, the L2 for Restaking

name: Penpie
description: Penpie is a next-generation product by @magpiexyz_io that's set to revolutionize @pendle_fi

name: Bedrock uniETH
description: uniETH represents the staked ETH in Bedrock plus all future staking rewards. uniETH is non-rebasing, i.e. does not grow in quantity over time but grows in value instead. In other words, 1 uniETH will be worth more than 1 ETH as time goes on, and its value will continue to increase as more time passes

name: InceptionLRT (Isolated Restaking)
description: Restake ETH LSTs on Inception, built on Eigenlayer to earn 2 layers of rewards
